zh.lifeSummary: Andrew Carruthers是Simon Carruthers 4th Laird of Mouswald的兒子，於大約1385年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾姆斯瓦爾德。他於1409年與Elizabeth Dinwoodie在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1438年9月在他的家鄉享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Andrew Carruthers是Simon Carruthers 4th Laird of Mouswald的儿子，于大约1385年出生在英国苏格兰度福利爾姆斯瓦爾德。他于1409年与Elizabeth Dinwoodie在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1438年9月在他的家乡享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Carruthers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place near Ecclefechan in Dumfries, locally pronounced ‘kridders’. The name is early recorded as Carrothres or Caer Ruther, and derives from British caer ‘fort’ + a personal name.

variants.name: Crothers
meanings: Irish (northern, especially Down): variant of Scottish   Carruthers  .

variants.name: Carrithers
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Carruthers  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain; it was once common in Yorkshire.

variants.name: Cruthis
meanings: Altered form of Scottish and northern Irish   Carruthers  . This surname is found mainly in IL and NC.

variants.name: Cruthirds
meanings: Altered form of Scottish and northern Irish   Carruthers  . This surname is found mainly in MS.

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

en.lifeSummary: Andrew Carruthers was born about 1385, in Mouswald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the son of Simon Carruthers 4th Laird of Mouswald. He married Elizabeth Dinwoodie in 1409, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in September 1438, in his hometown, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Andrew Carruthers est né environ 1385, à Mouswald, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fils de Simon Carruthers 4th Laird of Mouswald. Il a épousé Elizabeth Dinwoodie en 1409, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en septembre 1438, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans.

Er hat 1409 in Schottland, United Kingdom Elizabeth Dinwoodie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im September 1438 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: Andrew Carruthersは約1385年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアモウスワルドでSimon Carruthers 4th Laird of Mouswaldの息子として生まれた。1409年にイギリススコットランドでElizabeth Dinwoodieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1438年9月に故郷で54歳で死去した。

ko.Holmains Castle, Dalton, Dumfries and Ga: 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 돌턴
ko.lifeSummary: Andrew Carruthers(은)는 대략 1385년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 모우스월드에서 Simon Carruthers 4th Laird of Mouswald의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1409년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Elizabeth Dinwoodie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1438년 9월 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Andrew Carruthers nasceu aproximadamente 1385, em Mouswald, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom filho de Simon Carruthers 4th Laird of Mouswald. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Dinwoodie em 1409, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em setembro de 1438, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos.

ru.Holmains Castle, Dalton, Dumfries and Ga: далтон, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Andrew Carruthers родился около 1385 г. в местности мусвалд, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Simon Carruthers 4th Laird of Mouswald. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Dinwoodie в 1409 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер сентябрь 1438 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.
